title: 50PCS Christmas Paper Straw Drinking Cocktail Straws Biodegradable Red Green Striped Party Straws for Christmas, Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower Party Supplies
features: Package includes: 50Pcs paper straws, 25pcs per pack, red and green stripe design, very vivid and cute for use in party.
Material: Made of paper material, safe to use.
Size: the length of each paper straw is 19.6cm/7.8 inches and the diameter is 0.2 inch/ 0.6cm, suitable for most containers, such as bottles, cans and cocktail cups, etc.

Thick and Sturdy: Made with multiple layers of thick paper, can hold up great and will not fall apart or melt in hot / cold liquid for an extended period of time. Suitable for cocktail, smoothie, juice, water, milk, cold coffee and sodas.

Widely Use: Great for Birthday party, baby shower, wedding shower, bridal shower, housewarming party, engagement party, graduation celebrations and also can be used for craft and many kids DIY projects; Create colourful, cake topper, lolly sticks, and photo prop holders.
description: Biodegradable Paper Straws Set Party Perfectly Add the perfect trendy touch to your party and are the perfect accessories to add to any holiday, birthday, baby Shower, wedding, and bachelorette parties. Be creative and create the perfect cake pops and other pastries with these straws! Everyday use These paper straws are ideal for your home, office, school, birthday party, summer festival, and other kid’s events. They can also be used every day at your home for serving kids their most favourite drink. Specifications: Size: 19.6cm/7.8 inches, 0.2 inch/0.6cm inner wide Colors: mixed-color Quantity: 50PCS Material: Paper. Package includes: 50x paper straws
